title: Add sandbox allow to start of a Phoenix channel join/3
prompt: Write `lib/my_app_web/channels/room_channel.ex` with a single `join/3` clause for `"room:lobby"` that, as its FIRST action, calls `Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox.allow(socket.assigns.phoenix_ecto_sandbox, Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox)` and then returns `{:ok, socket}`. The allow call must come before any Repo access.
tier_rationale: Documented pattern. Sonnet produces it when prompted with the exact function.
research_citation: "`allow/2` needs to be manually called once for each channel, at best directly at the start of `c:Phoenix.Channel.join/3`" — Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox docs
